results.title: Indian-origin player makes FIFA World Cup debut as Australia stun Turkiye in Vancouver
results.description: Nishan Velupillay, an Australian footballer of Indian heritage, stepped onto the field for his FIFA World Cup debut on Sunday, June 14, 2026. It happened as Australia opened their Group D campaign with a 2-0 victory over Turkiye. He entered the contest from the bench in the 61st minute and spent the closing stages helping his side secure a disciplined defensive shape against persistent pressure.

results.title: Bhagwant Mann govt to take devotees on free teerath yatra to Salasar Balaji Dham, Sri Khatu Shyam Ji, Haridwar-Rishikesh and Shri Mathura Ji-Vrindavan Dham: Arvind Kejriwal
results.description: Addressing a gathering in the presence of CM Bhagwant Singh Mann, Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) National Convenor Arvind Kejriwal said the Punjab Government is not only enabling devotees to undertake sacred pilgrimages free of cost but is also investing in the restoration and development of revered religious sites.
